name: All-Day Breakfasts
blurb: To eat in or takeaway — served all day.

items.name: Spammie's Special
items.description: 3 bacon, 3 sausages, 3 spam, 2 black pudding, 2 hash browns, 2 eggs, mushrooms, beans, tomatoes, 2 bread & butter, 2 fried bread and a regular tea or coffee.

items.name: Large Breakfast
items.description: 2 bacon, 2 sausages, 1 egg, beans, mushrooms, tomatoes, 1 bread & butter and 1 fried bread and a regular tea or coffee.

items.name: Small Breakfast
items.description: 1 bacon, 1 sausage, 1 egg, beans, mushrooms, tomatoes, 1 bread & butter or 1 fried bread and a regular tea or coffee.

items.name: Veggie Breakfast
items.description: 1 veggie sausage, 1 hash brown, mushrooms, 1 egg, beans, mushrooms, tomatoes, 1 bread & butter or 1 fried bread and a regular tea or coffee.
